Notice Of Motion Andmotion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, Of An Order Reimbursing Funds Wrongfully Levied Upon And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT JALIMEX FOODS CORPORATION, A CORPORATION AKA RAMEX FOODS INC.'S Notice Of Motion Andmotion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, For An Order Reimbursing Funds Wrongfully Levied Upon And Request For Monetary Sanctions. JUDGMENT VACATED. PLAINTIFF TO RETURN LEVIED AMOUNTS TO DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR SANCTION DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB/JF)

Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Continued To Apr-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
